title: 6inch ASR Outdoor Serrated Fixed Blade Tanto Point Hunting Neck Knife - Black
description:
This 6 Inch Wearable Tanto Neck Knife is the perfect tool for anyone who needs convenient yet durable cutting ability. With a Tanto style blade, the knife is not only discrete and easy to carry at all times, it is effective in multiple ways; with a dull back you can have precise firm cutting and you can have it wherever you may go. The blade itself is 3.5" in length, and the overall length is 6" including the handle. The knife comes with a necklace style thick plastic sheath that offers protection and convenience with a lock in place pin to hold the knife handle down steadily.
